query: I'm building a prospect list for our sales team — enrich these companies with structured firmographic data: Stripe, Datadog, and HashiCorp. For each, I need founding year, total funding, current valuation, employee headcount, headquarters, key decision makers, and tech stack as typed JSON

We have a CRM lead for Anthropic — qualify this lead by enriching it with company size, industry vertical, recent funding rounds, key executives, competitive landscape, and estimated annual revenue. Return structured JSON matching our CRM schema

Build company profiles for our competitive analysis — get structured data for Vercel, Netlify, and Cloudflare Pages including their product offerings, pricing tiers, customer counts, tech stack, and recent product launches

Enrich this sales prospect: Confluent (the Kafka company). I need firmographic data — founded, HQ, funding total, IPO details, employee count by department, key products, enterprise customers, and market share estimates in the event streaming space

Our BD team needs entity data for partnership evaluation — get structured profiles for MongoDB, CockroachDB, and PlanetScale with founding info, funding history, leadership team, developer community size, and GitHub stars

Qualify these inbound leads for our enterprise tier: Shopify, Squarespace, and BigCommerce. Return structured JSON with company size, annual revenue, tech stack, primary use cases, and likelihood to need our product based on their infrastructure choices

Build a structured entity lookup for OpenAI — get founding year, founders, all funding rounds with amounts and investors, current valuation, total headcount, office locations, and organizational structure as nested JSON
Search for recent news articles about Tesla's quarterly earnings and analyst predictions for next quarter
Find the official Bun documentation URL for their HTTP server API
Write a comprehensive market analysis of the fintech industry covering payment processing, neobanking, and embedded finance with 5-year growth projections
Go to https://stripe.com/pricing and extract all the plan names, costs, and feature comparisons into a table
Scrape https://docs.convex.dev/api and extract the full API reference for Convex queries and mutations
Write a Python script to parse our CSV export and generate summary statistics for each column
Fix the failing integration test in src/services/billing.test.ts — the Stripe webhook handler is returning 400
Create a strategic report on cloud computing trends with competitive analysis of major providers and recommendations for our infrastructure migration
